nodes.label: AI for generating measurable objectives
nodes.label_negative: AI generating vague or non-measurable objectives
nodes.grounding_span: I am very satisfied when AI generates measurable objectives

nodes.label: AI for documentation efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: If I use AI more I think I'll be able to spend less time on documentation

nodes.label: Human collaboration in goal-setting
nodes.grounding_span: I usually like to collaborate with clients to create goals together

nodes.label: Confidentiality in AI use
nodes.label_negative: Risk of confidentiality breach with AI
nodes.grounding_span: I don't know the best way to use AI and maintain confidentiality

nodes.label: Therapeutic effectiveness and client progress tracking
nodes.grounding_span: They just feel more easy to measure and monitor client's progress with

nodes.label: Client-centered collaboration
nodes.grounding_span: I usually like to collaborate with clients to create goals together

nodes.label: Time efficiency for client interaction
nodes.grounding_span: spend less time on documentation and more time meeting with people

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for measurable objectives
nodes.grounding_span: I am very satisfied when AI generates measurable objectives

nodes.label: Openness to expanding AI use for efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: If I use AI more I think I'll be able to spend less time on documentation

nodes.label: Resistance to AI in goal-setting
nodes.grounding_span: I never really ask AI to come up with goals for a treatment plan

nodes.label: Concern about confidentiality with AI
nodes.grounding_span: I don't know the best way to use AI and maintain confidentiality

nodes.label: Iterative refinement through follow-up questions
nodes.grounding_span: I sometimes ask for more examples with more objective measures if the responses are too vague

nodes.label: Selective delegation based on task centrality
nodes.grounding_span: I just feel like this is more central to the purpose and outcomes of therapy and I want to be more involved
